result.reasoning: The Sotho suffix -ana forms a diminutive noun. The question asks for the possible definite articles for singular nouns in the diminutive form in Dutch. From the tool call history (Step 2), singular diminutive nouns in Dutch always use the definite article "het". There are no exceptions or alternative articles for singular diminutives. The question requests a comma-separated list in alphabetical order; since only one article is possible, the list is "het". The evidence presents the article in lowercase, so authoritative casing is lowercase.
